name: Agra Affair
overview: Akash struggles to save his family's crumbling hotel while pursuing his dream restaurant. He falls for tour guide Tanvi, but their romance faces hurdles. Akash's path intertwines with Megha's, leading to a poignant story of love, ambition.

trailers.title: Agra Affair - Official Trailer | Aakash Dahiya, Harshita Gaur | Amazon MX Player
